title: East African Comunity Mediation Agreement (Transfer of Assets of Tanzania Based Assets Formerly Owned by the Defunct East African Airways Corporation to Air Tanzania Corporation) Order, 1995
title_en: East African Comunity Mediation Agreement (Transfer of Assets of Tanzania Based Assets Formerly Owned by the Defunct East African Airways Corporation to Air Tanzania Corporation) Order, 1995

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the East African Community Mediation Agreement (Transfer of Assets of Tanzania Based Assets Formerly Owned by the Defunct East African Airways Corporation to Air Tanzania Corporation ) Order.

In this Order unless the context otherwise requires— " Air Tanzania Corporation " means the Corporation established by paragraph 3 of the Air Tanzania (Establishment) Order 1 ; 1 G.N. No. 45 of 1977 " East African Airways Corporation " means the East African Airways Corporation established under the East African Corporation Act of the Community; " effective date " means 14th May, 1984.

The assets and liabilities specified in the First and Second Schedules to this order which were immediately before the effective date vested in the East African Airways Corporation and which were allocated to the United Republic of Tanzania, shall with effect from the effective date , vest in the Air Tanzania Corporation .
